personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in agentic AI, LLM orchestration, and cloud-native systems. Proficient in designing complex data pipelines and high-quality code using Python and C++, with expertise in prompt engineering and AI-driven workflows. Skilled in cloud platforms like AWS and eager to leverage Azure for Microsoft 365 products such as Copilot and Teams. Adept at performance tuning, big data technologies, and mentoring junior engineers. Passionate about contributing to Microsoft’s mission of empowering users globally through innovative sentiment intelligence solutions. Excited to collaborate on impactful AI systems for billions of users.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI). System orchestrates 10+ automated steps: semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered job scoring and tailoring, resume/cover letter generation, quality gating, and application tracking. Implemented multi-step agentic workflows with Claude Code and MCP server integration. Used RAG-style retrieval for semantic similarity matching across 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting processes with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine built on Python, PySpark, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard with real-time capacity insights and High Trust utilization scores.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed full serverless data platform using S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file problem using Snappy + Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Data mining user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes for enhanced scalability.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead, improving provisioning accuracy.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, enabling precise seasonal risk forecasting.
Built interactive dashboards using matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly for executive-level reporting and real-time insights.
Applied statistical analysis and data mining to identify underutilized infrastructure, driving significant cost savings through hardware consolidation.
Integrated disparate data feeds into unified Oracle reporting systems, streamlining decision-making processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for critical systems, ensuring optimal performance for Brand.com.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing actionable optimization recommendations.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS1.2 security, and supported cloud migration to AWS.
Provided end-to-end monitoring and dashboarding for before/after performance metrics analysis.
Analyzed system bottlenecks and proposed performance improvements to enhance user experience.
Integrated Performance Center with Dynatrace for comprehensive monitoring solutions.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems, ensuring reliable performance monitoring.
Managed and supported monitoring solutions to maintain system integrity and uptime.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Led large-scale CA APM implementations and upgrades (9.1 to 10.1), managing 4,000–6,000 agents for enterprise clients.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, and alerts, along with Perl/Ksh scripts for data extraction.
Provided sizing recommendations, Golden Images, and client training while resolving bottlenecks in J2EE/.NET environments.

Served as CA APM SME for TIAA-CREF, overseeing 50+ Enterprise Managers for robust monitoring.
Documented implementations and supported client organizations with technical expertise and training.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications to identify load and break points, documenting key metrics like JDBC, threads, memory, CPU, and GC.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for performance monitoring and issue detection.
Created automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.
Provided detailed performance analysis to optimize resource allocation and system efficiency.

bullets: Led massive migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and ensure data integrity.
Refactored systems to handle 10x the throughput of VISA, ensuring high performance and reliability.
